headline: FAA Move Puts Boeing 777 9 Closer To Cash Flow Test
summary: US Federal Aviation Administration allows Boeing’s 777-9 to enter the fourth and final phase of certification. This move clears an important hurdle for the first aircraft in Boeing’s long delayed 777X family. Certification progress comes as Boeing’s widebody program faces scrutiny after execution delays and contract adjustments. For investors watching Boeing (NYSE:BA), the certification progress arrives after a mixed period for the stock. Shares recently closed at $196.42, with a 7.6% gain...

headline: BAE Systems and U.S. Department of War sign agreement to quadruple THAAD seeker production
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has signed a landmark seven-year framework agreement with the Department of War (DoW) to quadruple production capacity and accelerate delivery of the infrared seeker for the Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) interceptor missile in support of Lockheed Martin Corporation. The THAAD seeker provides critical sensing and guidance capabilities to help protect the United States and its global allies from ballistic missiles.
